title: micromeria cristata subsp. orientalis
intro: Micromeria cristata subsp. orientalis, a sub-species of the Micromeria cristata plant, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Micromeria cristata subsp. orientalis are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antimicrobial properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.
